name: Cherry Pop Drop Earrings
description: The Scarlet Cherry Drop Earrings embody playfulness with a trace of sophistication, and they are meant to be the color highlight of the daily outfits. The earrings with the red cherry-like drops, shining with light, and paired with the sparkling stone studs are in the right place between fun and minimal charm.\n\nThe earrings are of a very light weight and so comfortable that they do not disturb your movements and this is why they are so suitable for informal outings, brunch dates, or giving a bright accent to plain dresses. The earrings are designed to look fresh and modern but not like a disguise, they convey a subtle statement that is too easy and not flashy to be ignored.

name: Golden Bloom Crystal Necklace Set
description:
Description:

Make a statement full of grace by using the Golden Bloom Crystal Necklace Set which is made to increase the very festive and traditional looks. This set designed with very detailed floral patterns and sparkling crystal stones not only brings a rich bridal charm but also gives the wear feel lighter and more comfortable at the same time.

The necklace is the main piece of this set lying on the neck, while beautiful drop earrings, a maang tikka and a necklace are the pieces that complete the look. All these accessories are made for weddings, festive celebrations, sangeet and ethnic parties besides being quite attractive. The gold-tone finish and the stonework give it a luxurious appearance and at the same time it is comfortable to wear.

Ideal for those who appreciate traditional Indian jewelry with a hint of glitter.

Set Includes:

1 Necklace
1 Pair of Earrings
1 Maang Tikka

Material & Details:

a Gold-tone alloy base
b Crystal-style stones
c Adjustable chain closure 
d Lightweight for a full set
e  Suitable for ethnic & festive wear

name: Golden Petal Cascade Earrings
description:
Golden Petal Cascade Earrings, while delicate, are still very eye-catching. They come from a designer's imagination who saw soft flower shapes and flow in motion. The craftsmanship of these earrings is revealed through the warm gold-colored layered petals that give a graceful cascading effect, which is light and feminine.

The little crystal on the top is a subtle attention grabber and it is just the right amount of sparkle added, so the earrings would be fine for both day events and evening outings. They are so light and comfy that they go very well with Indian traditional clothing, dresses, and even modern fusion looks.

They are a versatile statement piece which seems to be classy and yet not overbearingly heavy. MATERIAL DETAILS:  Gold-tone alloy
Textured petal-shaped design
Crystal accent at stud
Lightweight & comfortable
Push-back closure

name: Royal Blue Teardrop Necklace Set
description:
The Royal Blue Teardrop Necklace Set, elegant and timeless, is designed to add a luxurious sparkle to evening and festive looks. The set with deep blue stones on a silver-tone base and subtle crystal detailing creates a perfect harmony between boldness and elegance.

The necklace has a teardrop shape with flowing and elegant stone drops, the earrings being a matching piece adding a little movement and shine. Perfect for parties, receptions, festive gatherings, or formal occasions.

This is a timeless masterpiece that looks great in pictures and enhances even the most basic outfits.SET INCLUDES: 1 Necklace , 1 Pair of Earrings, 1 Maang Tiika. MATERIAL INCLUDES: Silver-tone alloy base, Blue stone & crystal detailing, Lightweight, comfortable wear, Adjustable chain closure

description:
Radiant and magnificent, the Amber Butterfly Drop Earrings are intended to give the appearance of a warm and elegant lady. The earrings consist of beautifully crafted butterfly-stud in gold-tone plating and shining facet-cut drops of amber-colored crystals which are able to reflect the light in splendid way.

They are light and comfortable to wear, so they will give you the necessary sparkle without the feeling of heaviness or being overdone. These earrings will find their place in every day events, Christmas parties, brunches, and even night outs as they bring together charm and sophistication with no effort.

An excellent pick for those who like to wear beautiful but still not too loud and bright pieces of jewelry. Material & Details:
Gold-tone alloy
Faceted amber-colored crystal drop
Butterfly stud design
Lightweight & easy to wear
Push-back closure

The gold-tone framework is intricately sculpted into floral and crescent motifs, creating a layered, regal silhouette that sits beautifully along the neckline.

Designed for brides and grand occasions, this set pairs heirloom charm with modern finesse. Each stone catches the light like a whispered secret, making it perfect for weddings, receptions, festive soirées, and couture styling.

Material: Gold-plated alloy, kundan stones, synthetic rubies, pearls

Crafted to sit perfectly on the ear, these hoops balance elegance and practicality. The twisted detailing adds depth and dimension while maintaining a timeless look that pairs seamlessly with both casual and dressy outfits.
